name: Lao Feng Xiang Co., Ltd.
summary: Lao Feng Xiang Co., Ltd. operates in the jewelry industry in the People's Republic of China and internationally. It researches, develops, designs, produces, and sells gold, silver, platinum, diamonds, jade, pearls, gold inlays, colored gemstones, enamel, red coral, and other jewelry, as well as dental carvings, K gold glasses, and travel craft souvenirs. The company was formerly known as China First Pencil Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Lao Feng Xiang Co., Ltd. in July 2009. Lao Feng Xiang Co., Ltd. was founded in 1848 and is based in Shanghai, the People's Republic of China.
